title: Croatian Vegetable Stir Fry
description: A hearty and flavorful stir fry dish made with a variety of vegetables, perfect for a quick and easy dinner. This recipe is inspired by traditional Chinese cuisine.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and ginger and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
Add the sliced Croatian Vegetable and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes, or until tender.
Add the diced chicken and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, or until cooked through.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce and sesame oil.
Pour the sauce over the chicken and vegetables and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Transfer the stir-fry to a serving bowl and garnish with chopped green onions and sesame seeds.
